changelog: 2.1.0 - Performance: content-visibility: auto on messages (native lazy rendering)
2.1.0 - Performance: DocumentFragment in renderMsgs (batched DOM inserts)
2.1.0 - Performance: will-change: contents on streaming message + .mt for paint opt
2.1.0 - Performance: preconnect/dns-prefetch for Ollama host
2.1.0 - Performance: STATE.msgs capped at 100, requestIdleCallback for saves
2.1.0 - Performance: Service Worker cache for instant repeat loads
2.1.0 - Performance: lazy-loaded vendor scripts (marked, DOMPurify, hljs load on first render)
2.1.0 - Performance: rAF-driven HW stats polling, hidden tab skip, 25s throttle
2.1.0 - Performance: client-side image resize (800px max) reduces base64 payload 5-10x
2.1.0 - Performance: low-RAM mode disables all CSS animations (<4 GB RAM)
2.1.0 - Performance: ThreadPoolExecutor (8 workers), gzip compression for static assets
2.1.0 - Performance: unified file cache (content + ETag/stat in one lookup), no redundant os.stat()
2.1.0 - Performance: incremental appendMsg/finishStream (no full DOM rebuild on new messages)
2.1.0 - Performance: MEMORYSTATUSEX reused in _get_hardware_specs, headerIds disabled in marked
2.1.0 - Fix: /api/token and /api/stats exempted from auth (401 chicken-and-egg bug)
2.1.0 - Performance: incremental DOM streaming, deferred markdown/hljs, rAF-batched tokens
2.1.0 - Performance: static file caching (LRU), 16KB proxy buffer, Content-Length/ETag headers
2.1.0 - Performance: MEMORYSTATUSEX at module level, pre-warm CPU thread, 10s HW poll
2.1.0 - Tuning: num_ctx 2048, num_batch 256, num_thread 0 defaults
2.1.0 - CSS: will-change/contain hints, RAM detection in installer
2.0.0 - Security hardening: auth token, CORS restriction, rate limiting, XSS sanitization, SHA256 verification
2.0.0 - Documentation: security considerations section, updated model catalog, folder architecture
2.0.0 - Architecture: centralized config files, migration script, version tracking
